name: Helix Acquisition Corp. III
business: Helix Acquisition Corp. III is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has neither engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date. The company intends to focus its search on healthcare or healthcare-related industries.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an initial business combination target in any industry, we intend to focus our search on healthcare or healthcare-related industries.
